course.name: AI Basics for Small Business Owners
course.description: Welcome to AI Basics for Small Business Owners - your gateway to understanding and leveraging artificial intelligence in your business.

modules.title: Module 1: Understanding AI
modules.description: Learn what AI is and how it works for small businesses.
modules.content:
Understanding AI

Introduction to AI for small business owners.

questions.question: What does AI stand for?
questions.explanation: AI stands for Artificial Intelligence - technology that can learn and make decisions.
